reportedIssues: Game card rows in both "BetRivers Exclusive Games" and "Top Played New Games" are cut off on the right side, with the third card only partially visible.
The top category strip is also clipped on the right, with the "Hot Games" pill only partially visible.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue describes a negative jackpot value; both reported issues concern layout clipping problems with game cards and category pills.
